messages.snippet: Hi Andrea, Do you have some time this week to talk about Dane? Some details below… Dane's behavior at home is getting increasingly difficult to manage. He is getting more aggressive about food. In
Hi Corey, I can meet with you this Thursday to discuss. 8:30 or 10am—please let me know what works. We can go through medication options that may help. I want to discuss either working to lower his

messages.snippet: Thu 830am works. Good call on DDA. He no longer has a case worker since that got cut, but I have a supervisor I've been in contact with, so I'll email him. Corey On Mon, Apr 13, 2026 at 1:25 PM
Okay he's scheduled for 4/16 at 8:30am Andrea Valdez, MN, ARNP (she/her) Psychiatric Nurse Practitioner MINDFUL THERAPY GROUP 206-453-5707 x129 / Fax 206-453-5816 CURRENT PATIENTS I am in clinic on

messages.snippet: Hi Aaron/Katelyn, We corresponded previously about my adult son, Dane, and his eligibility for DDA. Not sure who to send this to, but I would like the email below added to his file. Dane's behavior
Hi Corey, I wanted to let you know that I received this email. I'm not the right person. You don't currently have a services case manager – so I need to conduct my review before you can apply

messages.snippet: ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Johnson, Katelyn M (DSHS/HCLA/DDCS) <katelyn.warenski@dshs.wa.gov> Date: Wed, Apr 15, 2026 at 4:46 PM Subject: RE: Dane To: Corey Badcock <cbadcock
Hi Katelyn, Thank you so much for this message. If you can do his review, that is really helpful. I know there's a process and budget issues. At min I just want to start documenting some of this as
